title: Customer branch access and form filtering
goal: Restrict customer visibility and workorder forms to the user's department branch.
requirements: Add a branch-aware view scope such as department_branch.
Change default customer view_scope from all to department_branch.
Make can_edit and other object actions unable to bypass can_view.
Restrict department and device querysets in WorkOrderForm and WorkOrderUpdateForm by user branch.
If customer has no User.department, return an empty visible queryset and safe form options.
Avoid repeated full Department tree queries per workorder where practical.
acceptance: Customer sees workorders in own department and descendants.
Customer does not see sibling or parent-foreign branch workorders.
Customer cannot open foreign detail URL.
Customer cannot edit authored foreign-branch workorder through direct URL unless policy explicitly keeps that exception.
Customer cannot POST create/update with foreign department or foreign device.
Technician behavior remains assigned/unassigned/authored per existing rules.
